overall.description: A first-person perspective train ride through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, departing Congress & MLK station and traveling through neon-lit urban canyons, passing holographic aquarium displays at Memorial Park station, with cinematic focus on a fellow passenger with cybernetic implants.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered metro platform with glass safety doors

events.description: train doors close and vehicle begins departing Congress & MLK station

agents.ego_description: standing on the platform waiting for the train to depart

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figures standing on the opposite platform behind the glass doors

entered.detail: illuminated cyan neon station sign reading CONGRESS & MLK mounted on the wall
transparent safety doors with metal frames separating platform from tracks
illuminated billboard display showing advertisements on the platform wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a covered metro platform at Congress & MLK station, characterized by cyan neon signage and glass safety doors. The platform is sparsely populated with waiting passengers visible in the distance as the train prepares to depart.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track with panoramic city views

events.description: emerging from station into open night city illuminated by neon billboards and building lights
train rounds a curve revealing the dense urban canyon of skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: seated inside the moving train looking out at the passing neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: passenger with braided hair and cybernetic head implants sitting by the window

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for Khalil Rousseau Fervid featuring two human figures
tall dark building with regular grid of illuminated windows rising into the night
multiple floating holographic billboards and neon signs between buildings

segments.scene_description: The train departs the station and enters the elevated urban canyon of Night City, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. A fellow passenger with visible cybernetic implants sits by the window as the train curves through the dense downtown architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit tunnel with holographic aquarium displays

events.description: train enters Memorial Park station area with large holographic fish tanks visible through the windows
passing the Memorial Park sign and exiting the aquarium tunnel section

agents.ego_description: continuing through the tunnel section observing the holographic aquatic displays

entered.detail: large window showing glowing blue holographic fish and jellyfish swimming in digital water
illuminated yellow neon station sign reading MEMORIAL PARK on the tunnel wall
vertical strips of green glowing light lining the tunnel architecture

segments.scene_description: The train enters a tunnel section featuring the distinctive Memorial Park station, where large windows display holographic fish and aquatic life in blue neon. The environment shifts from open city views to an enclosed, artificially lit space with green accent lighting before emerging back into the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: train interior with urban night views

events.description: passing bright yellow neon light columns that illuminate the train interior with golden light
camera pans right to reveal more of the train interior and other seated passengers

agents.ego_description: looking around the train interior and watching the passing neon cityscape while seated

notable_agents.action: passenger with cybernetic head implants drinking from a green bottle and gazing out the window
other passengers seated further down the train car near the connecting door

entered.detail: vertical strips of bright yellow light lining the tunnel walls creating dramatic interior lighting
brown cushioned bench seats and yellow handrails inside the metro car
digital screen showing the train route and station information above the seats

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the train interior as it continues through the neon-lit city, passing bright yellow light columns that bathe the cabin in golden light. The camera reveals more of the train's interior including other passengers, while the cybernetically enhanced passenger remains visible in the foreground drinking and looking out at the passing advertisements and skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile metro platform into the neon-drenched urban canyons and holographic tunnels of Night City. It begins at the Congress & MLK station among cyan signage and glass safety doors before the train departs, gliding into an elevated cityscape of towering skyscrapers and glowing advertisements. As the train curves through the downtown architecture, the view shifts from the open city to the enclosed, artificially lit space of Memorial Park station, where blue neon holographic fish and green accent lighting flicker past the windows. The scene then transitions back into the urban landscape, with the cabin interior being bathed in rhythmic flashes of golden light from passing yellow columns. Finally, the camera settles on a fellow passenger with cybernetic implants who looks out at the passing skyscrapers while the train continues its journey through the luminous city.
